violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Please email inspector proof of completion of a food safety manager course. Inspector gave the person in charge a food safety manager application at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025
